result.summary: C2 complete: Created GradientEditor.ts with pure interpolateGradient and mapWithGradient functions (worker-safe). GradientEditorUI.ts provides DOM-based editor with 2-4 color stops, pickers, position sliders, add/remove buttons, enable checkbox, and live 200x20 canvas preview. 8 gradient tests pass. Integration into shared files (worker, colorMapping, ControlsPanel) deferred to C5.
